result_schema.title: tg_stat_name
result_schema.guid_formula:
IF [url_kanala_aaem] = 'https://t.me/joinchat/OP3e3jXATQIzNmRi' THEN
    'Основной'
ELSEIF [url_kanala_aaem] = 'https://t.me/negburo' THEN
    '@negburo'
ELSEIF [url_kanala_aaem] = 'https://t.me/joinchat/bn_xVEVje1Y4MDdi' THEN
    'Москва'
END
result_schema.formula:
IF [tg_stat_url] = 'https://t.me/joinchat/OP3e3jXATQIzNmRi' THEN
    'Основной'
ELSEIF [tg_stat_url] = 'https://t.me/negburo' THEN
    '@negburo'
ELSEIF [tg_stat_url] = 'https://t.me/joinchat/bn_xVEVje1Y4MDdi' THEN
    'Москва'
END

result_schema.title: channel_name
result_schema.guid_formula:

END
result_schema.formula:
